entity.label: Ziphron
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Sweet odour, a city on the northern border of Palestine (Num. 34:9), south-east of Hamath.

nodes.label: Ziphron
nodes.description: Sweet odour, a city on the northern border of Palestine (Num. 34:9), south-east of Hamath.

verses.text: And the border shall go on to Ziphron, and the goings out of it shall be at Hazarenan: this shall be your north border.
